title: About 1 — Feryal Clark MP
text_excerpt: About 1 — Feryal Clark MP 0 Skip to Content Feryal Clark MP Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Campaigns Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Open Menu Close Menu Open Menu Close Menu Feryal Clark MP Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Campaigns Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Folder: Campaigns Back Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Upcoming events Feryal runs regular monthly events in different venues across the constituency, which are great ways to chat informally with your MP and raise issues or concerns with Feryal. In addition, Feryal sometimes organises larger meetings in community venues to address specific issues, such as the recent meeting on speeding on the A10 and car meets.
